hero.label: The Residence Concept
hero.title: More than a residence. A quieter way of living.
hero.description: Zoi Villa Residence is a private residential community where every detail is designed for tranquility, privacy and long-term family living.
hero.cardDescription: An environment fully dedicated to residents and private living.

identityTitle: A residential community built around privacy.

highlights.card1Text: The residence is designed for residents, not for public circulation.
highlights.card2Text: The absence of commercial activity helps preserve a calm atmosphere.
highlights.card3Text: Modern apartments and selected villas with private pools.

livingExperience.label: For Residents
livingExperience.title: Every space is designed for a quieter way of life.
livingExperience.description: Open spaces, villa privacy and the organization of the residence create a balanced environment for long-term living.
